parameters.query: SELECT plan_json FROM exercise_plans WHERE user_id = $1 AND is_active = true LIMIT 1
UPDATE exercise_plans SET is_active = false WHERE user_id = $1 AND is_active = true
INSERT INTO exercise_plans (user_id, week_number, year, plan_json, fitness_level, is_active, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, true, NOW()) RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.userId, $('Parse Workout Plan').first().json.weekNumber, $('Parse Workout Plan').first().json.year, JSON.stringify($('Parse Workout Plan').first().json.planJson), $('Parse Workout Plan').first().json.fitnessLevel] }}
